name: Lemon Granita
recipeInstructions:
1. PLACE A NON-REACTIVE ROASTING PAN OR GRATIN DISH IN THE FREEZER.
2. BRING SUGAR AND WATER TO A BOIL IN A SAUCEPAN, STIRRING OCCASIONALLY TO DISSOLVE SUGAR.
3. ALLOW THE SYRUP TO COOL.
4. STIR IN THE LEMON JUICE AND POUR THROUGH A FINE STRAINER TO ELIMINATE ANY SEEDS OR PULP.
5. PLACE THE MIXTURE INTO THE PREPARED PAN AND RETURN TO THE FREEZER.
6. WHEN THE MIXTURE BEGINS TO FREEZE, STIR EVERY 10 MINUTES OR SO, SCRAPING THE FROZEN MIXTURE FROM THE BOTTOM AND SIDES OF THE PAN AND MIXING IT WITH THE AS-YET-UNFROZEN MIXTURE.
7. WHEN THERE IS NO LONGER ANY UNFROZEN LIQUID IN THE PAN, PACK THE GRANITA INTO A CHILLED CONTAINER AND PRESS PLASTIC WRAP AGAINST THE SURFACE.
8. SERVE WITHIN A FEW HOURS FOR BEST TEXTURE. IF THE GRANITA FREEZES TO A SOLID BLOCK, POP IT OUT OF THE CONTAINER AND CUT INTO THICK SLICES WITH A STAINLESS STEEL KNIFE. FINELY CHOP THE SLICES, REPLACE IN THE CONTAINER, AND REFREEZE UNTIL SERVING TIME.
9. SERVE IN CHILLED STEM GLASSES.
10. SUBSTITUTE LIME OR GRAPEFRUIT JUICE FOR DISTINCTLY DIFFERENT FLAVORS.
Makes 1 Quart
